Handles copying framebuffer content to the display driver and checks update progress.

# Purpose
The `compositor_display.h` file is a C header file that declares functions for managing the display update process in a graphics system. It provides the function [`compositor_display_update`](<#compositor_display_update>), which initiates the process of copying framebuffer content to the display driver. This function takes a callback parameter, `handle_update_complete_cb`, which is called when the update is complete. Additionally, the file declares the function [`compositor_display_update_in_progress`](<#compositor_display_update_in_progress>), which returns a boolean value indicating whether a display update is currently in progress. This header file is essential for integrating display update functionality into a graphics system.
